artifacts.sourceTitle: Pokyn dekanky c. 01/2026: Pokyny k vyuzivani nastroju umele inteligence pri zpracovani zaverecnych praci na FAPPZ CZU

artifacts.claimText: For FAPPZ CZU final theses, the 2026 dean's instruction allows AI tools only as support and says AI must not replace the student's own expert work, analysis, interpretation, or argumentation.

artifacts.claimText: For FAPPZ CZU final theses, the 2026 dean's instruction requires students to state whether AI tools were used and to list the specific tools if AI materially affects thesis content or wording.

artifacts.claimText: For FAPPZ CZU final theses, the 2026 dean's instruction says unpublished data, sensitive or personal data, and confidential information must not be entered into AI tools.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Pokyn dekanky c. 01/2026: Pokyny k vyuzivani nastroju umele inteligence pri zpracovani zaverecnych praci na FAPPZ CZU
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI lze vyuzivat pouze jako podpurny nastroj pri zpracovani zaverecne prace. Student je povinen pri zpracovani zaverecne prace pracovat samostatne a prokazat vlastni odborne schopnosti. AI nesmi nahrazovat klicove kompetence studenta, jako jsou odborna analyza, interpretace dat a formulace zaverecnych argumentu.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AI may be used only as a support tool for final thesis work; the student must work independently and AI must not replace expert analysis, data interpretation, or final arguments.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Pokyn dekanky c. 01/2026: Pokyny k vyuzivani nastroju umele inteligence pri zpracovani zaverecnych praci na FAPPZ CZU
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Student je povinen: a) uvest, zda pri zpracovani zaverecne prace vyuzil nastroje AI; b) uvest konkretni pouzite nastroje AI. Pokud AI zasahuje do obsahu nebo formulace casti zaverecne prace, je student povinen tento prispevek transparentne priznat.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The student must state whether AI tools were used and list the specific AI tools; if AI affects thesis content or wording, that contribution must be transparently acknowledged.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Pokyn dekanky c. 01/2026: Pokyny k vyuzivani nastroju umele inteligence pri zpracovani zaverecnych praci na FAPPZ CZU
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do AI nastroju nesmi byt zadavana: a) nepublikovana data; b) citlive nebo osobni udaje; c) duverne informace ziskane v ramci spoluprace s externimi partnery, grantovych projektu, firem nebo internich fakultnich vyzkumu.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unpublished data, sensitive or personal data, and confidential information from partners, projects, companies, or internal faculty research must not be entered into AI tools.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a faculty-scoped claim only. The evidence does not support a university-wide CZU policy claim.
Approved as a narrow FAPPZ final-thesis disclosure claim based on explicit original-language evidence.
Approved as a narrow data-handling claim for FAPPZ final-thesis AI use.

artifacts.title: Czech University of Life Sciences in Prague AI policy evidence snapshot
artifacts.summary: A faculty-scoped official PDF from FAPPZ CZU provides candidate evidence about AI use in final theses, including support-only use, disclosure of AI tools, and restrictions on entering sensitive or confidential data into AI tools. Official AI initiative and course pages were rejected for policy extraction.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The verified claim evidence is scoped to the Faculty of Agrobiology, Food and Natural Resources and final-thesis work; it should not be promoted as a university-wide CZU policy without additional official central evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
